title: korthalsella horneana
intro: Korthalsella horneana, also known as the "Australian liverwort," is a rare and endemic species of liverwort found in Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a hepatoprotectant and antioxidant. The health benefits of Korthalsella horneana may include the potential to protect the liver from damage, reduce inflammation, and improve overall well-being. Traditional herbal preparations of Korthalsella horneana involve drying and grinding the plant material to make a powder or tea, which can be used to support liver health and overall health.
